channel.title: Backups on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in Backups on simeononsecurity

item.title: CompTIA A+ (220-1202): Operational Procedures
item.category: "CompTIA A+ Course" , "Operational Procedures" , "Documentation" , "Change Management" , "Backups" , "IT Support" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Help Desk" , "Professionalism" , "IT Fundamentals"
item.description: Master operational procedures for the CompTIA A+ 220-1202 Core 2 exam. Learn documentation, change management, backups, safety, environmental controls, communication, scripting, and AI basics.

item.title: CompTIA Security+ (SY0-701): Security Architecture
item.category: "CompTIA Security+ Course" , "Security Architecture" , "Cloud Security" , "Data Protection" , "Resilience" , "Network Security" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Information Security" , "Zero Trust" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master security architecture for the CompTIA Security+ SY0-701 exam. Learn architecture models, infrastructure security, data protection, and resilience and recovery.
